scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && pnpm --filter @workspace/classifieds run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @workspace/classifieds run test:coverage
